entry.title: Re: connect to postgresql hyperscaler option service instance via pgadmin
entry.content:
Using https://dbeaver.io/ I was able to connect to the PostgreSQL via the SSH tunnel. But when I tried via psql it failed on my Mac OS System with this error:

psql: error: connection to server at "localhost" (::1), port 63306 failed: Connection refused
        Is the server running on that host and accepting TCP/IP connections?
connection to server at "localhost" (127.0.0.1), port 63306 failed: SSL error: certificate verify failed
connection to server at "localhost" (127.0.0.1), port 63306 failed: FATAL:  no pg_hba.conf entry for host "10.32.2.6", user "23b33ace65dc", database "FONdikbjyrhD", no encryption

entry.title: CAP Node.JS: Replace implementation of existing service
entry.content:
Hello CAP Community, Hi daniel.hutzel,

thanks to the answer from martin.stenzig3 at SAP CAP Dynamic Service Definition I was able to implement a functionality that loads a service definition plus it's JavaScript implementation from the database persistence. Check out srv/init.js where I fill the persistency and srv/server.js#L162 where the dynamic service is instantiated. With the REST Client script tests/app/dynamic.http#L20 I can execute the test to the hello-world function "hello" without problems.

But now I try to use that to replace the handler for an existing service (minimal.MinimalService). Unfortunately calling:

      services[serviceDefinition.ServiceName] = await cds
        .serve(serviceDefinition.ServiceName)
        .from(csn)
        .to("odata")
        .at(serviceDefinition.ServicePath)
        .with(eval(serviceDefinition.Implementation))
        .in(cds.app);

has no effect and the response is:

 Service \"minimal.MinimalService\" has no handler for \"hello\"

The usecase for this functionality is the following:

We already implemented a CAP Multitenant application using @sap/cds-mtxs that currently deploys new entities into an existing service using the functionality provided by cds.xt.ExtensibilityService. This gives us the benefit that all the deployment to the tenant specific HDI container is handled by cds-mtxs. That way also the generic handler implementations are triggered. But with a growing number of entities the metadata of the service gets hander to consume by the client applications. As the Entities belong already to a so called Environment we would like to create one service by Environment. cds.xt.ExtensibilityService does already support this. But until now we haven't found a way to set also our generic handlers for this new services.

Looking forward for your input.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Dynamic Service Definition
entry.content: A working example how a dynamic service can be added can be found in the links of the question: CAP Node.JS: Replace implementation of existing service

entry.title: Re: Showing an avatar with Initials or Image on the Fiori Element Object Page for a better user experience using RAP
entry.content:
Hi Pierre,

do you have any public example how you've implemented it in CAP?

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Fiori UI for Hierarchies (Hierarchical Treeview, Recursive Hierarchy)
entry.content:
Hi Christoph,

thank you for your response. Should it work also with a CAP based non-draft OData V4 service? If yes, then it would be great if SAP Fiori elements for OData V4 Feature Showcase would be enhanced to have a working example.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: How to change the subdomain of a Subaccount
entry.content:
Direct link to the note for easier access:

2800224 - Unable to rename the Subdomain in SAP Cloud Foundry

entry.title: Re: FullStack BTP developer exercises
entry.content:
Have you seen:

Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP

entry.title: Re: How to connect to postgres Database using CAPM application ?
entry.content:
Did you run the command:

cf enable-ssh YOUR-HOST-APP

?

I had also issues connecting with psql. But I was able to connect using DBeaver.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAPM Association Modelling yielding inconsistent attribute names on foreign key joins
entry.content: Please read the documentation on Domain Modeling and try to use the cuid aspect.

entry.title: Re: 401 Unauthorized error where redirecting back from external site to portal
entry.content: With Portal do you mean the on Premise NetWeaver Java based Portal?

entry.title: Re: Fiori Standard App activation - Analytical (Smart Drill down app)
entry.content: How do you think others should be able to help without giving any further information like what error messages you see in the developer tools console, what request maybe failed in the network tab?

entry.title: Re: FullStack BTP developer exercises
entry.content: You might check out the getting started area of the official CAP documentation and begin at Jumpstart & Grow as You Go. Maybe the Tutorials there are a better fit for you. And maybe you want to learn by watching. dj.adams.sap just started a new series on CAP.

entry.title: Re: Localised Entities being shown in generated Open API
entry.content:
Please check the documentation:

Omitting Elements from APIs

entry.title: Re: Localised Entities being shown in generated Open API
entry.content: Have you tried adding the annotation to to the Attributes_texts entity?

entry.title: Re: SAP Gateway Demo Server - registration error
entry.content:
You can try if rac-support@sap.com can help you.

E can -Mail sende can

entry.title: Re: Asking and Answering Questions in the Community After Migration
entry.content:
Hi @jerryjanda,

I have two questions regarding the Q&A:

1. Today I've got this E-Mail Notification for a question that I'm following:

when I click the link:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/re-transport-auf-multi-target-applications-between-subaccounts/qaq-p/13588357/comment-id/4815112/emcs_t/S2h8ZW1haWx8dG9waWNfc3Vic2NyaXB0aW9ufExTMUU1QU1XSzg4SlVDfDEzNTg4MzU3fFNVQlNDUklQVElPTlN8aEs#M4815112

It opens the question but doesn't navigate to the actual reply. That Is maybe related to my second topic:

2. When they are replies to a question or answer there is the "Show replies" text. Only when I click it I can see the replies. Is there an option that I can set in the platform to show everything at once? 


Does anyone have a pointer on what the arrow UX design is based on? I would rather use the same pattern as in the VS Code explorer and use > when something is closed and the arrow down when it's open.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Start CAP without express to run a Cloud Foundry task
entry.content:
Hello CAP Team, Hi @Daniel7,

I have a CAP application that creates quite huge Excel files and allows also the upload of the edited files. The uploaded files are processed and data is written to S/4HANA. This download and upload processing is quite resource extensive and sometimes blocks the interactive usage of the application. Due to that reason I want to do the processing in a Cloud Foundry Task. Marius Obert lists "Running a data processing script" as one use cases in the blog post CloudFoundryFun #4 – How to use Cloud Foundry Tasks.

So I went forward and created a first prototype with srv/loadDataFromMock.js. As I do not need a CAP Server providing an HTTP endpoint I used (with a hint from @david_kunz2  ) the example from the CAP documentation for the Built-in server.js. What would be great if @sap/cds/server.js would provide directly a way to start the CAP standard server but just without express and a http server.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Consume Catalog and Consumption Endpoints in a UI5 application
entry.content:
I've filed the case 725305/2023 via SAP Support on 22nd of August 2023 with the subject: "Unauthorized when using OAuth 2.0 SAML Bearer Assertion flow". I did setup my Datasphere instance to trust the BTP Subaccount using SAML. When running the test script datasphere.http I can get a token for Datasphere using the 

OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion Destination. But this token works only for the Datasphere API Endpoint /api/v1/dataimport/models and not for /api/v1/dwc/catalog/ where I get an access denied.

entry.title: Re: Configure the client to call the identity authenticat...
entry.content: See comment.

entry.title: Re: Configure the client to call the identity authentication provider error not found
entry.content: Hi D, the second link is an example request and not a link to the guide. Can you update your post and provide a link to the guide you're following further?
